meaning: 比塞大[突尼斯北部港市]
examples: The picture was that of a long tenuous line stretching from bizerte to gafsa.
The picture, then, when general anderson took over the entire battle front, was that of a long tenuous line stretching from bizerte to gafsa.
Stadiums in Bizerte, Monastir and Sfax are being refurbished for the event and are supposed to be finished by November.
